## How was this tested?

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build NetOverseer.slnx -c Release` completes without new warnings.
- [ ] `dotnet test NetOverseer.slnx` is green.
- [ ] No private paths, tokens, PII, or credentials in the diff (logs, tests, screenshots).
- [ ] Changed / new files carry the SPDX header (`// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0`).
- [ ] New dependencies are license-compatible with Apache-2.0 and added to `THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md`.
- [ ] README / `docs/` updated if behavior or usage changes.
- [ ] Read and accepted the Code of Conduct ([CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)).

- [ ] This PR contains substantially AI-generated code. *(Please indicate so the review can be weighted accordingly; see CONTRIBUTING.md.)*
